description_long: This is a white coupe utility vehicle with a sleek, modern design, featuring a two-door cabin and an extended cargo bed covered with a black tonneau. The front end displays a prominent grille with a badge, flanked by clear headlights and a smooth, contoured hood. The side profile reveals large, dark alloy wheels, a single black trim line running along the doors, and flush door handles. The rear is characterized by rectangular taillights, a tailgate with a central badge, and a license plate. The windows are tinted, and the interior appears to have two tan seats. The vehicle sits on a dark, paved surface, suggesting it is intended for urban or suburban environments.
description: A white two-door coupe utility vehicle with a black cargo bed cover, large dark wheels, and a modern, streamlined design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tailgate, rectangular taillights, central badge, and black bed cover.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door cabin, black trim, large wheels, and extended cargo bed.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the grille, headlights, contoured hood, and tan interior seats.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe cabin, black trim, and cargo bed.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
